title: dactylorhiza coccinea
intro: Dactylorhiza coccinea, also known as the Red Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive red or pink flowers. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza coccinea include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Dactylorhiza coccinea can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
